            or go to the ER immediately.

Department:     Cardiology
Handles:        Heart-related conditions
Available:      9AM - 5PM
Urgency:        рџ”ґ Emergency
Recommendation: For new or worsening chest pain/palpitations, go to Emergency. For routine checkup or stable symptoms, schedule a Cardiology OPD visit between 9AMвЂ“5PM.
